parameters.jsCode:
// CLX Outreach Generation — Phase 6
// Constructs complete Claude prompt with all lead intelligence

const lead = $input.item.json;

const lines = [
  'You are an expert B2B sales copywriter. Your job is to write highly personalized outreach messages that feel genuinely human and researched.',
  '',
  'CRITICAL WRITING RULES:',
  'Write exactly like a real human professional would write.',
  'Never use dashes hyphens or bullet points anywhere in any message.',
  'Never use bold text or any markdown formatting.',
  'Never use em dashes or en dashes between words.',
  'Write in natural flowing sentences and paragraphs.',
  'Write with natural contractions. Sound like a real person.',
  'Sound warm and genuinely curious not salesy.',
  'Read like a personal note not a marketing email.',
  'The reader should feel like you know them personally.',
  'No formal business language or corporate speak.',
  'Short sentences. Conversational rhythm. Real words.',
  '',
  'Lead Intelligence:',
  'Name: ' + (lead.full_name || ''),
  'Company: ' + (lead.company || ''),
  'Industry: ' + (lead.industry || ''),
  'Job Title: ' + (lead.job_title || ''),
  'City: ' + (lead.city || ''),
  'Research Summary: ' + (lead.research_summary || ''),
  'Likely Business Need: ' + (lead.likely_business_need || ''),
  'Research Angle: ' + (lead.research_angle || ''),
  'Campaign: ' + (lead.campaign_name || ''),
  'Value Proposition: ' + (lead.campaign_value_proposition || ''),
  'Pain Point: ' + (lead.campaign_pain_point || ''),
  'Call To Action: ' + (lead.campaign_call_to_action || ''),
  'Tone: ' + (lead.campaign_tone || ''),
  '',
  'General rules:',
  'Never use generic openers like I hope this finds you well.',
  'Reference something specific about their company or industry.',
  'Every message must feel like it was written specifically for this person.',
  'End every message with a soft clear call to action.',
  'Never mention Crystallux by name. Position as their solution.',
  '',
  'Email subject line: under 8 words, no punctuation at the end, intriguing not salesy.',
  '',
  'Email body rules:',
  'Maximum 120 words.',
  'Three short paragraphs maximum.',
  'First paragraph: one specific observation about their business.',
  'Second paragraph: one clear relevant value statement.',
  'Third paragraph: one soft call to action.',
  '',
  'LinkedIn message rules:',
  'Sound like a genuine connection request.',
  'Reference one specific thing about their work.',
  'No pitch in the first message.',
  'Under 250 characters.',
  '',
  'WhatsApp message rules:',
  'Sound like texting a warm contact.',
  'Casual and friendly tone.',
  'No corporate language whatsoever.',
  'Under 100 words.',
  '',
  'Follow up message: reference the first outreach naturally, keep it short and human, not pushy.',
  '',
  'Return ONLY raw JSON with no explanation no markdown no code blocks:',
  '{',
  '  "email_subject": "compelling subject line under 8 words",',
  '  "email_body": "personalized email body maximum 120 words three paragraphs",',
  '  "linkedin_message": "genuine connection request under 250 characters",',
  '  "whatsapp_message": "casual warm message under 100 words",',
  '  "followup_message": "natural follow up referencing first outreach",',
  '  "outreach_angle": "one sentence describing the hook used",',
  '  "personalization_score": 8',
  '}'
];

const prompt = lines.join('\n');

return {
  json: {
    ...lead,
    prompt: prompt
  }
};

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", max_tokens: 2000, messages: [{ role: "user", content: $json.prompt }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ email_subject: $json.email_subject, email_body: $json.email_body, linkedin_message: $json.linkedin_message, whatsapp_message: $json.whatsapp_message, followup_message: $json.followup_message, outreach_angle: $json.outreach_angle, personalization_score: $json.personalization_score, lead_status: $json.lead_status, outreach_generated_at: $json.outreach_generated_at, updated_at: $json.updated_at }) }}
